title: Welcome to Floyd Command
description: This is a sample task to get you started.

title: Test Task from API
description: Testing create

title: Test
description: Test

title: Test 1.1: New Lead → First Contact Speed
description:
What: Does the system contact a new lead within 60 seconds?

**If fail:** Check Lead_Inquiry_AI_Call trigger → check n8n VAPI outbound workflow execution log
acceptance_criteria: Opportunity created in Roofing Pipeline → "New Lead Created" stage
Tag `start_new_lead_cadence` applied
First SMS received on your phone within 60 seconds
VAPI call received within 2 minutes

title: Test 1.2: Business Hours SMS Logic
description:
What: Does the system send the RIGHT SMS based on time of day?

**If fail:** Check Lead_Inquiry_AI_Call time-of-day condition nodes
acceptance_criteria: If created during business hours (8am-8pm): Daytime SMS message
If created after hours: After-hours SMS message
SMS tone matches time of day (not a "good morning!" text at 9pm)

title: Test 1.3: VAPI Call — Lead Answers, Books Appointment
description:
What: Happy path — lead picks up, Sarah books them

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver branches → n8n VAPI completion workflow → Rep Appointment Notification
acceptance_criteria: Sarah sounds natural, uses Luna voice
She captures appointment details
Call ends cleanly
Within 30 seconds of call ending: n8n "Vapi Call Completion" workflow fires
GHL contact updated with call result
Tag `appointment_confirmed` applied
Opportunity moved to "Appointment Set" stage
Rep gets SMS notification at +17744443510
Confirmation SMS sent to lead
Confirmation Email sent to lead
Contact REMOVED from Lead_Nurture_Sequence (no more drip SMS)

title: Test 1.4: VAPI Call — No Answer
description:
What: Lead doesn't pick up. Does the system retry correctly?

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver "No Answer/Voicemail" branch → does it increment counter and re-trigger?
acceptance_criteria: Call goes to voicemail / rings out
n8n receives "no answer" result
GHL contact field `AI_Call_Attempt` incremented (should now = 1)
System waits ~2 hours
SECOND VAPI call attempt made (double-dial day 1)
If still no answer: `AI_Call_Attempt` incremented to 2

title: Test 1.5: VAPI Call — Lead Says "Not Interested"
description:
What: Lead picks up and declines

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver "Not Interested" branch
acceptance_criteria: Sarah handles rejection gracefully
n8n receives "not interested" result
Tag `not_interested` applied
Opportunity moved to "Lost" stage
Contact REMOVED from all active workflows
NO further SMS or calls sent to this contact

title: Test 1.6: VAPI Call — Lead Requests Callback
description:
What: Lead says "call me back later"

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver "Callback Requested" branch
acceptance_criteria: Sarah acknowledges callback request
Tag `callback_requested` applied
Task created in GHL assigned to rep
No immediate retry (different from no-answer)

title: Test 1.7: VAPI Calling Hours Enforcement
description:
What: Does the system respect 8am-8pm calling window?

**If fail:** Check calling hours conditions in Lead_Inquiry_AI_Call and n8n VAPI workflow
acceptance_criteria: SMS may still send (check if SMS also has hours restriction)
VAPI call does NOT fire outside 8am-8pm
Call queues until next business hours window
Call fires at or shortly after 8am next day

title: Test 2.1: Nurture Sequence Starts
description:
What: Does the SMS drip begin after lead enters system?

**If fail:** Check if Lead_Nurture_Sequence trigger fires on the right tag
acceptance_criteria: Contact is enrolled in Lead_Nurture_Sequence
First nurture SMS arrives (may be same day or next day depending on timing)

title: Test 2.2: Day 1-3 Cadence Timing
description:
What: Does the drip follow the designed schedule?

**Note:** This is a multi-day test. Log timestamps of each SMS received.
**If fail:** Check Wait nodes in Lead_Nurture_Sequence
acceptance_criteria: Touch 1: Day 1 — SMS sent
Touch 2: Day 3 — SMS sent
Messages arrive during business hours only
Wait periods between touches match design (1-3 days)

title: Test 2.3: Engagement Detection — SMS Reply Stops Drip
description:
What: When lead replies, does the nurture sequence stop?

**If fail:** Check SMS_Receiver → n8n Inbound Reply Handler → Lead_Nurture_Sequence engagement condition
acceptance_criteria: SMS_Receiver workflow fires
Webhook sent to n8n `/webhook/inbound-reply`
Inbound Reply Handler classifies as "engage" intent
Tag `engaged` applied to contact
Contact REMOVED from Lead_Nurture_Sequence immediately
NO more automated nurture SMS after this point
Appropriate response sent back (or rep notified)

title: Test 2.4: Engagement Detection — Does Sequence Check Tag?
description:
What: At each SMS cycle, does the workflow actually check for the "engaged" tag?

**If fail:** Check condition nodes between SMS touches in Lead_Nurture_Sequence
acceptance_criteria: At next cycle check, workflow detects "engaged" tag
Workflow exits → sends webhook to n8n → internal notification
No more SMS sent

title: Test 2.5: Full 6-Touch Completion (No Engagement)
description:
What: If lead never engages, does the full sequence play out and exit cleanly?

**Note:** This is a 14-day test. Set a reminder to check.
**If fail:** Check end nodes of Lead_Nurture_Sequence
acceptance_criteria: Touch 1 (Day 1) → SMS
Touch 2 (Day 3) → SMS
Touch 3 (Day 5) → SMS
Touch 4 (Day 7) → SMS
Touch 5 (Day 10) → SMS
Touch 6 (Day 14) → SMS
After Touch 6: workflow ends, contact exits
Contact should then enter Long_Term_Nurture (if active) or exit system

title: Test 3.1: Pricing Question
description:
What: Lead asks about price — does n8n route correctly?

**If fail:** Check Inbound Reply Handler classification branches
acceptance_criteria: SMS_Receiver fires → webhook to n8n
Inbound Reply Handler classifies as pricing intent
Appropriate auto-response OR rep notification sent
Contact tagged `engaged`

title: Test 3.2: Booking Intent
description:
What: Lead wants to book — does it trigger booking flow?

**If fail:** Check Inbound Reply Handler "close" branch
acceptance_criteria: Classified as booking intent
Booking link sent OR appointment created OR rep notified
Contact removed from nurture drip

title: Test 3.3: Negative Response
description:
What: Lead says no — does it handle gracefully?

**If fail:** Check Inbound Reply Handler opt-out handling
acceptance_criteria: Classified as negative/opt-out
Contact removed from all automated sequences
No further messages sent
Possible: tag `not_interested` applied, opportunity updated

title: Test 3.4: Ambiguous Response
description:
What: Lead sends something unclear

**If fail:** Check Inbound Reply Handler fallback/default branch
acceptance_criteria: Handler either asks clarifying question OR routes to rep for manual follow-up
Does NOT auto-book or auto-close
Rep gets notification with the message content

title: Test 4.1: Appointment Created → Rep Notification
description:
What: When appointment is booked, does rep get notified?

**If fail:** Check webhook URL matches → n8n execution log → Twilio/SMS delivery
acceptance_criteria: GHL workflow "Appointment Created - Notify Rep" fires
Webhook POST to n8n `/webhook/rep-appt`
n8n "Rep Appointment Notification" processes it
Rep receives SMS at +17744443510 with: contact name, time, address
SMS arrives within 30 seconds

title: Test 4.2: Appointment Confirmation to Lead
description:
What: Does the lead get confirmation SMS + email?

**If fail:** Check Appointment_Confirmation_Sequence
acceptance_criteria: Confirmation SMS sent to lead's phone
Confirmation email sent to lead's email
Contact removed from conflicting workflows

title: Test 4.3: Appointment Reminders (if active)
description:
What: Do reminders fire at correct intervals?

**Note:** Check which system handles reminders — GHL (retired to Draft) or n8n (Appointment Reminders is "Needs Review"). If NEITHER is active, this is a gap.
**If fail:** Identify which system should own reminders and activate it
acceptance_criteria: 24h before: reminder email
2h before: reminder SMS
Internal notification to team
If appointment is in the PAST when workflow runs: skip communications (don't send stale reminders)

title: Test 5.1: No-Show Stage Change → Tag + Webhook
description:
What: Moving to No Show stage triggers the recovery chain

**If fail:** Check Opportunity_Stage_Change condition → No Show Trigger workflow
acceptance_criteria: Opportunity_Stage_Change fires
Tag `no_show` applied
No Show Trigger to n8n fires → webhook to `/webhook/no-show`
n8n No-Show 7-Day Rebook Cadence starts

title: Test 5.2: No-Show First Contact (Within 5 Minutes)
description:
What: First recovery SMS fires fast

**If fail:** Check No-Show 7-Day Rebook Cadence first node timing
acceptance_criteria: First SMS arrives within 5 minutes of no-show marking
Message tone is empathetic (Sarah No-Show Recovery voice)
Message offers to reschedule

title: Test 5.3: No-Show VAPI Recovery Call
description:
What: Does Sarah No-Show Recovery call the lead?

**If fail:** Check No-Show 7-Day Rebook Cadence VAPI trigger nodes + calling hours conditions
acceptance_criteria: VAPI call from Sarah No-Show Recovery assistant (f90488f9)
Call uses empathetic rebook tone (different from initial Sarah)
Call happens during business hours (8am-8pm) only
If outside hours: call queues to next window

title: Test 5.5: No-Show Recovery → Lead Re-Books
description:
What: If the no-show lead rebooks, does recovery stop?

**If fail:** Check if No-Show cadence checks for engagement tags like the nurture sequence does
acceptance_criteria: Inbound Reply Handler catches the message
Contact tagged `engaged`
No-Show cadence STOPS (contact removed)
Booking flow triggered
New appointment created

title: Test 6.1: Lead Shows → Proper Tagging
description:
What: When lead shows up, tags update correctly

**If fail:** Check Opportunity_Stage_Change "Showed" branch
acceptance_criteria: Tag `showed` applied
n8n Rep Show/No-Show Check detects this (runs every 15 min)

title: Test 6.2: Won → Victory Path
description:
What: Closing a deal triggers proper tagging

**If fail:** Check Opportunity_Stage_Change "Won" branch
acceptance_criteria: Tags `customer` and/or `won` applied
All automated outreach stops
Contact marked as customer in system

title: Test 6.3: Lost → Clean Exit
description:
What: Lost deal removes contact from everything

**If fail:** Check Opportunity_Stage_Change "Lost" branch → Remove from Workflow action
acceptance_criteria: Contact removed from ALL active workflows
No further SMS, calls, or emails
Opportunity marked appropriately

title: Test 6.4: Rep Won/Lost Check (n8n Polling)
description:
What: n8n polls GHL every 6 hours to catch missed updates

**If fail:** Check n8n workflow schedule trigger → GHL API call
acceptance_criteria: n8n Rep Won/Lost Check executes on schedule (every 6h)
Detects showed contacts from past 48 hours
Processes them correctly

title: Test 7.1: Duplicate Lead Prevention
description: What: Same person enters twice — does the system handle it?
acceptance_criteria: GHL either deduplicates OR creates second contact
If duplicate: only ONE set of automations runs (not double-messaging)
If separate: both enter system (may need dedup logic)
**Document behavior — this is a potential issue to solve

title: Test 7.2: Contact with No Phone Number
description:
What: Lead enters without a phone — does system break?

**If fail:** Check if workflows have null checks on phone field
acceptance_criteria: SMS actions skip (no number to send to)
VAPI call skips (no number to call)
System doesn't error out
Email-only touchpoints still work (if any)

title: Test 7.3: Rapid SMS Replies (Spam Prevention)
description: What: Lead sends 5 messages in 2 minutes — does n8n handle it?
acceptance_criteria: Each fires SMS_Receiver → n8n
n8n doesn't send 5 auto-responses
Some dedup or throttle logic prevents message flooding
**Document behavior — if no throttle exists, flag as issue

title: Test 7.4: Workflow Collision — Lead in Multiple Sequences
description:
What: Can a lead be in Nurture AND No-Show simultaneously?

**If fail:** Check Remove from Workflow actions in No-Show flow
acceptance_criteria: No-show should REMOVE from nurture first
Only No-Show recovery messages send (not nurture + recovery overlap)

title: Test 7.5: n8n Workflow Failure Recovery
description: What: If n8n errors mid-workflow, what happens?
acceptance_criteria: Failed executions logged
Error notifications sent (email or webhook)
Failed contacts don't get stuck in limbo
**Document: Does n8n retry failed executions? Is there an error notification configured?

title: Test 8.1: VAPI Call Drops Mid-Conversation
description:
What: Call disconnects unexpectedly — does the system recover?

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver — does it have a branch for dropped/incomplete calls?
acceptance_criteria: n8n receives call result (should be "incomplete" or "no answer" type)
System does NOT treat as "appointment booked"
System does NOT treat as "not interested"
Contact re-enters retry logic (another call attempt scheduled)
No orphaned/stuck state

title: Test 8.2: Maximum Call Attempts — What's the Cap?
description:
What: After X failed calls, does the system stop calling?

**If fail:** Check Vapi_Call_Results_Receiver "No Answer" branch — is there a max check?
acceptance_criteria: Call attempt counter increments each time
System stops calling after a defined max (what number? 3? 5? Unlimited?)
After max attempts: contact falls into SMS-only nurture
System does NOT call forever
**Document:** What is the actual max? If there's no cap, this is a critical issue.

title: Test 8.3: VAPI Assistant Personality — Sarah vs Sarah No-Show
description:
What: Correct assistant used for correct scenario

**If fail:** Check which VAPI assistant ID is referenced in each n8n workflow
acceptance_criteria: Initial call uses Sarah (a02b7113) — excited, first-contact tone
No-show recovery uses Sarah No-Show Recovery (f90488f9) — empathetic rebook tone
They sound different in tone/approach
Neither breaks character or sounds robotic

title: Test 8.4: VAPI + GHL Tool Integration
description:
What: Sarah has 4 GHL tools — do they all work?

**If fail:** Check VAPI assistant tool configuration → GHL API credentials
acceptance_criteria: Sarah can look up contact info from GHL
Sarah can book appointments in GHL calendar
Sarah can update contact fields
Sarah can check availability/calendar slots
All 4 tools respond within acceptable latency (< 3 seconds)

title: Test 8.5: VAPI Call to Landline
description:
What: What if lead's number is a landline?

**If fail:** Check SMS delivery error handling in GHL workflows
acceptance_criteria: VAPI call still goes through (landlines can receive calls)
SMS messages fail silently or are handled (landlines can't receive SMS)
System doesn't error out on failed SMS delivery
Contact isn't stuck in a broken state

title: Test 8.6: Simultaneous Call + SMS Timing
description:
What: Does the lead get a call AND text at the same moment?

**If fail:** Check ordering/wait nodes between SMS and webhook trigger in Lead_Inquiry_AI_Call
acceptance_criteria: SMS arrives first (faster to send)
VAPI call follows shortly after
Lead is NOT on the phone with VAPI when another SMS arrives
Sequencing is clean, not chaotic

title: Test 9.1: STOP Keyword (SMS Opt-Out)
description:
What: Lead texts "STOP" — does ALL messaging cease?

**If fail:** Check Twilio opt-out settings → GHL DND (Do Not Disturb) flag
acceptance_criteria: GHL/Twilio recognizes STOP keyword
Contact marked as opted-out at carrier/Twilio level
ALL SMS workflows stop for this contact
VAPI calls also stop (or at minimum, system knows they opted out)
No further automated messages of any kind
If lead texts again later, system handles re-opt-in correctly
**CRITICAL — TCPA violation if this doesn't work**

title: Test 9.2: DND (Do Not Disturb) Flag
description:
What: If contact has DND enabled in GHL, does everything stop?

**If fail:** Check if GHL workflows check DND before sending
acceptance_criteria: No SMS sent
No calls made
Workflows either skip communication actions or remove contact
No errors thrown

title: Test 9.3: After-Hours Compliance
description:
What: No calls or texts outside permitted hours

**If fail:** Check calling hours conditions across ALL workflows (GHL + n8n)
acceptance_criteria: No VAPI calls made after 8pm
SMS behavior documented (some businesses allow 9pm texts, some don't)
All 19 customer-facing actions in No-Show cadence respect 8am-8pm
No weekend calling (if business policy — document this)

title: Test 9.4: Consent Tracking
description: What: Does the system track HOW the lead opted in?
acceptance_criteria: Lead source captured (form, ad, manual entry)
Timestamp of consent recorded
If someone asks "how did you get my number" — there's an answer in the system
**Document:** If consent tracking doesn't exist, flag as compliance risk

title: Test 10.1: Timezone Handling
description:
What: What timezone does the system use? Is it consistent?

**If fail:** Check timezone settings in GHL location, n8n workflow timers, VAPI config
acceptance_criteria: GHL timezone: _________ (document it)
n8n timezone: _________ (document it)
All time-based conditions use SAME timezone
"8am" in calling hours means 8am in the LEAD'S timezone (not server timezone)
If lead is in Pacific time and system is Eastern, calls don't go out at 5am Pacific
**CRITICAL — wrong timezone = calling people at 5am**

title: Test 10.2: Weekend Behavior
description: What: Do automations run on Saturday/Sunday?
acceptance_criteria: Document: Are SMS messages sent on weekends?
Document: Are VAPI calls made on weekends?
Document: Are no-show recovery attempts made on weekends?
Whatever the behavior is, it should be INTENTIONAL not accidental
**Decision needed:** Does Jack want the system active 7 days or weekdays only?

title: Test 10.3: Wait Node Accuracy
description:
What: Do wait nodes fire when they say they will?

**If fail:** Check n8n execution settings → workflow timeout settings
acceptance_criteria: Action fires within a reasonable window of the stated wait (±5 minutes)
Waits don't stack or multiply (e.g., 2 hour wait doesn't become 4 hours)
If n8n restarts during a wait, the wait resumes correctly (not resets)

title: Test 10.4: Appointment Time Zone on Rep Notification
description:
What: When rep gets "appointment at 2pm" — is that the right timezone?

**If fail:** Check n8n Rep Appointment Notification template → time field formatting
acceptance_criteria: Time in rep notification matches the actual appointment time
Timezone is explicit or matches rep's local time
No confusion between UTC and local

title: Test 11.1: Contact Fields Survive Round-Trip
description:
What: Data sent GHL→n8n→VAPI→n8n→GHL stays intact

**If fail:** Check field mapping in n8n workflows → GHL API update calls
acceptance_criteria: After VAPI call completes and data returns to GHL:
Name unchanged
Phone unchanged
Email unchanged
New fields added correctly (call result, call attempt count)
No fields overwritten with blank/null values

title: Test 11.2: Opportunity Value Tracking
description: What: Does opportunity monetary value get updated?
acceptance_criteria: Initial creation: value = $0 (as designed)
After appointment booked: value updated? Or stays $0 until won?
After won: value reflects actual job value (if entered)
**Document current behavior

title: Test 11.3: Tag Conflicts
description: What: Can a contact have contradictory tags?
acceptance_criteria: System handles gracefully (one tag takes priority)
OR: system prevents conflicting tags
Contact doesn't get stuck in two workflows simultaneously
**Document behavior — may need tag cleanup logic

title: Test 12.1: n8n Goes Down — What Happens to GHL?
description:
What: If n8n is unreachable, do GHL workflows break?

**If fail:** Check GHL webhook retry behavior + n8n execution queue
acceptance_criteria: GHL webhook fires but gets error response from n8n
GHL workflow either: retries, logs error, or continues past webhook
Contact doesn't get stuck
When n8n comes back: no data lost (or document what IS lost)

title: Test 12.2: n8n Error Notifications
description: What: When a workflow fails, who gets notified?
acceptance_criteria: Error workflow configured (receives all failures)
Notification sent (email, webhook, or Slack) on failure
If NOT configured: set it up — silent failures = invisible bugs
**Document current error handling

title: Test 12.3: GHL Workflow Execution History
description:
What: Can we see what happened to every contact?

**If fail:** Check GHL workflow logging settings
acceptance_criteria: Each workflow shows execution history
Can see: when it ran, what branch it took, what actions fired
Can identify exactly where a failure occurred

title: Test 12.4: Twilio/SMS Delivery Failures
description:
What: What if SMS can't be delivered?

**If fail:** Check Twilio delivery webhook → GHL error handling
acceptance_criteria: SMS fails to deliver
Error logged somewhere (GHL or Twilio)
Workflow continues (doesn't freeze on failed SMS)
Contact isn't stuck waiting for SMS delivery confirmation

title: Test 12.5: VAPI Service Outage
description:
What: If VAPI is down, does the system handle it?

**If fail:** Check n8n VAPI workflow error handling nodes
acceptance_criteria: n8n logs the error
Contact falls back to SMS-only path
System doesn't silently drop the lead
When VAPI recovers, pending calls can be retried

title: Test 13.1: Multiple Leads at Once
description:
What: 5 leads enter simultaneously — does the system handle it?

**If fail:** Check n8n concurrency settings → GHL workflow queue behavior
acceptance_criteria: All 5 get processed
No webhook queue backup
No duplicate messages
n8n handles concurrent executions
VAPI doesn't try to call all 5 at the exact same second

title: Test 13.2: n8n Execution Limits
description:
What: Does the n8n plan have execution limits that could block the system?

**If fail:** Upgrade plan or optimize workflow execution count
acceptance_criteria: Document: Current plan allows _____ executions per month
Document: Current usage is _____ executions
Calculate: At 50 leads/month, approximately _____ executions needed
Is there headroom? Or will we hit limits?
